author: y4rr
content:
Landed.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-core/src/grad_fns/fft.rs\`

### 6 backward grad_fn structs
- \`FftnBackward\`, \`IfftnBackward\` (N-D complex)
- \`RfftnBackward\`, \`IrfftnBackward\` (N-D real ↔ Hermitian complex)
- \`HfftBackward\`, \`IhfftBackward\` (1-D Hermitian-symmetric ↔ real)

VJPs follow torch.fft / numpy convention (\`FftNorm::Backward\`):
- \`fftn(x)\` ⇒ \`grad_x = prod(s) * ifftn(grad_y)\`
- \`ifftn(x)\` ⇒ \`grad_x = fftn(grad_y) / prod(s)\`
- \`rfftn(x)\` ⇒ \`grad_x = irfftn(grad_y, s=original_real_shape)\`
- \`irfftn(x)\` ⇒ \`grad_x = rfftn(grad_y, s=original_real_shape)\`
- \`hfft(x)\` ⇒ \`grad_x = ihfft(grad_y, n=spectrum_input_n)\`
- \`ihfft(x)\` ⇒ \`grad_x = hfft(grad_y, n=signal_input_n)\`

### 6 differentiable forward wrappers
\`fftn_differentiable\`, \`ifftn_differentiable\`, \`rfftn_differentiable\`, \`irfftn_differentiable\`, \`hfft_differentiable\`, \`ihfft_differentiable\` — same signature as the base \`fft::*\` fns, attach the grad_fn when \`requires_grad\` and grad-tracking is enabled.

### Helpers
- \`fftn_norm_n\` / \`rfftn_norm_n\` resolve \`s\` / \`axes\` / default to inner-dim product, matching the forward's transform-axis discovery. The trailing complex pair (last dim of size 2) is excluded from the default complex axis set.

## Tests
10 new tests in \`grad_fns::fft::tests\` covering:
- Each \`*_differentiable\` attaches the right \`*Backward\` (name assertion via \`grad_fn().name()\`)
- \`fftn_no_grad_when_not_needed\` (no leaf → no grad_fn)
- \`fftn_backward_returns_real_grad_for_impulse\` — closed-form check on a 2x2 impulse, grad ones → grad_x = impulse
- \`fftn_norm_n_*\` — three cases for the normalization helper (default, explicit s, axes-only)

Total: \`grad_fns::fft\` tests: 18 pass, up from 8. Workspace tests: 0 regressions.
